evalAfter: (async()=>{const w=ms=>new Promise(r=>setTimeout(r,ms));const b=[...document.querySelectorAll('button,a')].find(el=>/Entrar a MOS/i.test(el.textContent||''));if(b)b.click();await w(2600);const igual=[...document.querySelectorAll('a,button')].find(el=>/Entrar a MOS igual/i.test(el.textContent||''));if(igual)igual.click();await w(800);try{MOS.nav('config')}catch(e){}await w(2000);try{MOS.setCfgTab('infra')}catch(e){}await w(4200);const c=document.getElementById('infraContenedor');for(const u of c.querySelectorAll('.ucard'))u.open=true;await w(300);const btn=[...document.querySelectorAll('#infraContenedor .ubtn')].find(x=>/editar/.test(x.textContent));if(btn)btn.click();await w(900);const igual2=[...document.querySelectorAll('a,button')].find(el=>/Entrar a MOS igual/i.test(el.textContent||''));if(igual2)igual2.click();await w(400);const m=document.getElementById('modalPersonal');return{open:m&&m.classList.contains('open')};})()
